frontmatter.title: Sublime Text for Web Development and Useful Plugins
frontmatter.description: This post is a collection of useful plugins available in Sublime Text 3, that I'm using as text editor in the development of this blog.

frontmatter.title: An Introduction
frontmatter.description: Hi everybody, I'm Giulia and with this very short post I'm going to open my blog, that I will mainly use to write about coding, machine & deep learning, Linux-related stuff and - why not - my hobbies.
